dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Titanomachya (named after the Titanomachy of Greek mythology) is an extinct genus of titanosaurian sauropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous La Colonia Formation of Argentina.

dinosaurs.name: Titanosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Titanosaurus (; lit.

dinosaurs.name: Tlatolophus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tlatolophus (meaning "word crest") is a genus of hadrosaurid dinosaur belonging to the tribe Parasaurolophini that lived during the Campanian stage of the Late Cretaceous in what is now Mexico.

dinosaurs.name: Tochisaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tochisaurus (meaning "Ostrich lizard") is a genus of small troodontid theropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous Period of Mongolia.

dinosaurs.name: Tongtianlong
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tongtianlong (meaning "Tongtianyan dragon") is a genus of oviraptorid theropod dinosaurs that lived in the late Maastrichtian epoch of the late Cretaceous period.

dinosaurs.name: Tornieria
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tornieria ("for Tornier") is a genus of diplodocid sauropod dinosaur from the Late Jurassic in Lindi Region of Tanzania.

dinosaurs.name: Torosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Torosaurus (meaning "perforated lizard", in reference to the large openings in its frill) is a genus of herbivorous chasmosaurine ceratopsian dinosaur that lived during the late Maastrichtian age of the Late Cretaceous period, between 68 and 66 million years ago, though it is possible that the species range might extend to as far back as 69 million years ago.

dinosaurs.name: Torvosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Torvosaurus  is a genus of large megalosaurine theropod dinosaur that lived approximately 165 to 148 million years ago during the Callovian to Tithonian ages of the late Middle and Late Jurassic period in what is now Colorado, Portugal, Germany, and possibly England, Spain, Tanzania, and Uruguay.

dinosaurs.name: Trachodon
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Trachodon (meaning "rough tooth") is a dubious genus of hadrosaurid dinosaur based on teeth from the Campanian-aged (Upper Cretaceous) Judith River Formation of Montana, U.S.

dinosaurs.name: Transylvanosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Transylvanosaurus (meaning "lizard from across the forest") is an extinct genus of rhabdodontid ornithopod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous (Maastrichtian) Hateg Basin of Romania.

dinosaurs.name: Tratayenia
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tratayenia is an extinct genus of megaraptoran theropod dinosaurs known from remains found in the Late Cretaceous (Santonian age) Bajo de la Carpa Formation of Argentina.

dinosaurs.name: Traukutitan
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Traukutitan is a genus of titanosaur sauropod dinosaur which lived during the late Cretaceous (Santonian age).

dinosaurs.name: Triceratops
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Triceratops ( try-SERR-ə-tops; lit.

dinosaurs.name: Trigonosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Trigonosaurus (meaning "triangle lizard" after Triangulo Mineiro, where it was found[1]), is a genus of saltasaurid dinosaurs from the Maastrichtian Serra da Galga Formation of Brazil.

source.originalWikimediaTitle: Trigonosaurus pricei (holotype, MCT 1488-R - cervical and dorsal vertebraez)

dinosaurs.name: Trinisaura
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Trinisaura is a genus of ornithopod dinosaur that lived during the late Campanian stage of the Upper Cretaceous, around 73 to 72 million years ago in what is now James Ross Island off the coast of northern Antarctica near Patagonia.

dinosaurs.name: Tsaagan
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tsaagan (meaning "white") is a genus of dromaeosaurid dinosaur from the Djadokhta Formation of the Late Cretaceous of Mongolia.

dinosaurs.name: Tsagantegia
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tsagantegia (/ˌsɑːɡɑːnˈteɪɡiə/; meaning Tsagan Teg) is a genus of medium-sized ankylosaurid thyreophoran dinosaur that lived in Asia during the Late Cretaceous period.

dinosaurs.name: Tsintaosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tsintaosaurus (/sɪntaʊˈsɔːrəs/; sic for the old transliteration "Tsingtao",[2] meaning "Qingdao lizard") is a genus of hadrosaurid dinosaur from China.

dinosaurs.name: Tuebingosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tuebingosaurus (meaning "Tübingen lizard") is a genus of massopodan sauropodomorph dinosaur from the Late Triassic Trossingen Formation of Germany.

dinosaurs.name: Tugulusaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tugulusaurus (meaning "Tugulu lizard") is a genus of coelurosaurian theropod dinosaur, belonging to the Alvarezsauroidea, that is known from the Early Cretaceous Tugulu Group in the Urhe area of China.

source.originalWikimediaTitle: Hypothetical skeletal reconstruction of Tugulusaurus with known material in white

dinosaurs.name: Tuojiangosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tuojiangosaurus (meaning "Tuo River lizard") is a genus of herbivorous stegosaurian dinosaur from the Late Jurassic Period, recovered from the Upper Shaximiao Formation of what is now Sichuan Province in China.

dinosaurs.name: Turanoceratops
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Turanoceratops ("Turan horned face") is a genus of herbivorous ceratopsian dinosaur from the late Cretaceous Bissekty Formation of Uzbekistan.

dinosaurs.name: Turiasaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Turiasaurus (meaning "Turia lizard") is a genus of sauropod dinosaurs.

dinosaurs.name: Tylocephale
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tylocephale (meaning "swollen head") is a genus of pachycephalosaurid dinosaur, a group of dome-headed, herbivorous ornithischians, that lived during the Early Maastrichtian stage (72-71 million years ago) of the Late Cretaceous in what is now Mongolia.

dinosaurs.name: Tyrannomimus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tyrannomimus (meaning "tyrant mimic") is an extinct genus of ornithomimosaurian theropod dinosaurs from the Early Cretaceous (Aptian age) Kitadani Formation of Japan.

dinosaurs.name: Tyrannosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tyrannosaurus (/tɪˌrænəˈsɔːrəs, taɪ-/)[a] is a genus of large theropod dinosaur.

dinosaurs.name: Tyrannotitan
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Tyrannotitan (/tɪˌrænəˈtaɪtən/; lit.

dinosaurs.name: Uberabatitan
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Uberabatitan (meaning "Uberaba titan", in reference to where it was found) is a genus of titanosaurian sauropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous of Brazil.

dinosaurs.name: Udanoceratops
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Udanoceratops (meaning "Udan-Sayr's horned face") is a genus of large leptoceratopsid dinosaur that lived during the Late Cretaceous period of Mongolia.

dinosaurs.name: Udelartitan
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Udelartitan is an extinct genus of saltasauroid titanosaurian sauropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous Guichón Formation of Uruguay.

dinosaurs.name: Ulughbegsaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Ulughbegsaurus (meaning "Ulugh Beg's lizard") is an extinct genus of carcharodontosaurid theropod dinosaurs from the Late Cretaceous Bissekty Formation (Turonian age) and Khodzhakul Formation (Cenomanian age) of Uzbekistan.

dinosaurs.name: Unaysaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Unaysaurus is a genus of herbivorous unaysaurid sauropodomorph dinosaur.

dinosaurs.name: Urbacodon
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Urbacodon (meaning "URBAC tooth") is a genus of troodontid theropod dinosaur.

dinosaurs.name: Uriash
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Uriash is a genus of titanosaurian sauropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous (Maastrichtian) of Romania.

dinosaurs.name: Utahceratops
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Utahceratops is an extinct genus of ceratopsian dinosaur that lived approximately 76.4~75.5 million years ago during the Late Cretaceous period in what is now Utah.

dinosaurs.name: Utahraptor
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Utahraptor (meaning "Utah's predator") is a genus of large dromaeosaurid (a group of feathered carnivorous theropods) dinosaur that lived during the Early Cretaceous period from around 139 to 135 million years ago in what is now the United States.

dinosaurs.name: Uteodon
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Uteodon (meaning "Ute tooth") is a genus of herbivorous iguanodontian dinosaur.

dinosaurs.name: Utetitan
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Utetitan (meaning "Ute giant") is an extinct genus of titanosaurian sauropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous of North America.

dinosaurs.name: Vagaceratops
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Vagaceratops (meaning "wandering (vagus, Latin) horned face", in reference to its close relationship with Kosmoceratops from Utah) is a genus of chasmosaurine ceratopsid dinosaur which lived during the Late Cretaceous period (late Campanian) in what is now Alberta.

dinosaurs.name: Valdoraptor
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Valdoraptor (meaning "Wealden plunderer") is a genus of ornithomimosaurian theropod dinosaur from the Early Cretaceous of England.

dinosaurs.name: Valdosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Valdosaurus ("Weald lizard") is a genus of bipedal herbivorous dryosaurid dinosaur known from the Early Cretaceous of the Isle of Wight and elsewhere in England.

dinosaurs.name: Vallibonavenatrix
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Vallibonavenatrix (meaning "Vallibona huntress" after the town near where its remains were found) is a genus of spinosaurid dinosaur from the Early Cretaceous (Barremian) Arcillas de Morella Formation of Castellón, Spain.

dinosaurs.name: Variraptor
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Variraptor ( VARR-i-rap-tor; "Var thief") is a possibly dubious and potentially chimaeric genus of dromaeosaurid theropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous of France.

dinosaurs.name: Vectaerovenator
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Vectaerovenator (meaning "Isle of Wight air-filled hunter" due to the pneumaticity of the vertebrae) is a genus of tetanuran theropod from the Early Cretaceous period of what is now England (Lower Greensand Group; Ferruginous Sands).

dinosaurs.name: Vectidromeus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Vectidromeus (meaning "Isle of Wight runner") is an extinct genus of hypsilophodontid ornithopod dinosaur from the Early Cretaceous Wessex Formation of England.

dinosaurs.name: Vectipelta
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Vectipelta (meaning "Isle of Wight shield") is an extinct genus of ankylosaurian dinosaur recovered from the Early Cretaceous Wessex Formation of England.

dinosaurs.name: Vectiraptor
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Vectiraptor (meaning "Isle of Wight thief") is a genus of dromaeosaurid dinosaur from the Barremian aged Wessex Formation of the United Kingdom.

dinosaurs.name: Velafrons
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Velafrons (meaning "sailed forehead") is a genus of lambeosaurine hadrosaurid dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous of Mexico.

dinosaurs.name: Velociraptor
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Velociraptor (; lit.

dinosaurs.name: Velocisaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Velocisaurus ("swift lizard") is a genus of noasaurid theropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous period of Argentina.

dinosaurs.name: Vespersaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Vespersaurus (meaning "western lizard") is a genus of noasaurid theropod dinosaur from the Cretaceous Rio Paraná Formation in the Paraná Basin, Brazil.

dinosaurs.name: Veterupristisaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Veterupristisaurus is an extinct genus of carcharodontosaurid theropod dinosaur known from the Jurassic of Tendaguru, Lindi Region of southeastern Tanzania.[1]

dinosaurs.name: Viavenator
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Viavenator (meaning "road hunter") is a genus of carnivorous abelisaurid theropod dinosaur that lived in the Santonian-aged (Late Cretaceous) Bajo de la Carpa Formation of Argentina.

dinosaurs.name: Volgatitan
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Volgatitan (meaning "Volga giant") is a genus of titanosaurian sauropod dinosaur from the Early Cretaceous of the Ulyanovsk Oblast, Russia.

dinosaurs.name: Vouivria
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Vouivria is a genus of herbivorous sauropod dinosaur, belonging to the Brachiosauridae, that lived in the area of present France during the Late Jurassic.

dinosaurs.name: Vulcanodon
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Vulcanodon (meaning "volcano tooth") is an extinct genus of sauropod dinosaur from the Early Jurassic uppermost Forest Sandstone of southern Africa.[1] The only known species is V. karibaensis.

dinosaurs.name: Walgettosuchus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Walgettosuchus (meaning "Walgett crocodile") is a dubious or possibly invalid genus of extinct tetanuran theropod dinosaur that lived in Australia during the Late Cretaceous (Cenomanian).[1][2][3] It is known from a single caudal vertebra.[4]

dinosaurs.name: Wannanosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Wannanosaurus (meaning "Wannan lizard", named after the location where it was discovered) is a genus of basal pachycephalosaurian dinosaur from the Maastrichtian-aged (Upper Cretaceous) Xiaoyan Formation, about 70 million years ago, in what is now Anhui, China.

dinosaurs.name: Weewarrasaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Weewarrasaurus is a genus of ornithopod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous of the Griman Creek Formation near Lightning Ridge, in New South Wales, Australia.

dinosaurs.name: Wellnhoferia
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Wellnhoferia (named after Peter Wellnhofer) is a genus of early prehistoric bird-like theropod dinosaur closely related to Archaeopteryx.

dinosaurs.name: Wendiceratops
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Wendiceratops is a genus of herbivorous centrosaurine ceratopsian dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous of Canada.[1]

dinosaurs.name: Wiehenvenator
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Wiehenvenator is a genus of megalosaurid theropod dinosaur from the Middle Jurassic (Callovian) of north western Germany.

dinosaurs.name: Willinakaqe
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Willinakaqe is a dubious genus of saurolophine hadrosaurid dinosaur described based on fossils from the late Cretaceous (late Campanian-early Maastrichtian stage) of the Río Negro Province of southern Argentina.

dinosaurs.name: Wintonotitan
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Wintonotitan (meaning "Winton titan") is a genus of titanosauriform dinosaur from the Cenomanian-aged (Late Cretaceous)[2] Winton Formation of Australia.

dinosaurs.name: Wuerhosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Wuerhosaurus is an extinct genus of stegosaurine stegosaur dinosaurs from the Early Cretaceous of China.

dinosaurs.name: Wulagasaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Wulagasaurus (meaning "Wulaga lizard", in reference to the discovery locality) is a genus of saurolophine hadrosaurid dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous of Heilongjiang, China.

dinosaurs.name: Xenoceratops
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Xenoceratops (meaning "alien horned face") is a genus of centrosaurine ceratopsid dinosaur known from the Late Cretaceous (middle Campanian stage), and is known to have lived in what is currently Alberta, Canada.

dinosaurs.name: Xenoposeidon
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Xenoposeidon (meaning "strange or alien Poseidon", in allusion to Sauroposeidon) is a genus of rebbachisaurid sauropod dinosaur from the Early Cretaceous of England, living about 140 million years ago.

dinosaurs.name: Xenotarsosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Xenotarsosaurus is a genus of abelisaurid theropod dinosaur that lived during the Late Cretaceous of Argentina.

dinosaurs.name: Xianshanosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Xianshanosaurus (Chinese: 岘山龙; pinyin: xiànshānlóng)[1] is a genus of sauropod dinosaur from the Early Cretaceous (Aptian-Albian) of the Ruyang Basin in Henan Province, China.

dinosaurs.name: Xiaotingia
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Xiaotingia is a genus of paravian theropod dinosaur, possibly an anchiornithid, from Middle Jurassic or early Late Jurassic deposits of western Liaoning, China.

dinosaurs.name: Xingtianosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Xingtianosaurus is an extinct genus of oviraptorosaurian theropod dinosaur that lived in what is now China during the Early Cretaceous.

dinosaurs.name: Xinjiangovenator
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Xinjiangovenator (meaning "Xinjiang hunter") is a genus of coelurosaurian dinosaurs, possibly part of the group Maniraptora, which lived in the Lianmuqin Formation of the Tugulu Group of China, dated to the Early Cretaceous period, sometime between the Valangi

source.originalWikimediaTitle: 昌吉恐龙馆 小新疆猎龙（Xinjiangovenator parvus）

dinosaurs.name: Xiongguanlong
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Xiongguanlong (/ɕiʊŋˌkwaːnˈlʊŋ/) is an extinct genus of tyrannosauroid theropod from the Early Cretaceous period of what is now China.

dinosaurs.name: Xuanhanosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Xuanhanosaurus (meaning "Xuanhan lizard") is a genus of theropod dinosaur that lived during the Middle Jurassic (Bathonian) of the Sichuan Basin, China, around 166 million years ago.

dinosaurs.name: Xuanhuaceratops
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Xuanhuaceratops (meaning "Xuanhua horned face") is a genus of dinosaur from the Late Jurassic Period.

dinosaurs.name: Xunmenglong
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Xunmenglong (from Chinese: 迅猛龍/迅猛龙; pinyin: Xùnměnglóng; lit.

dinosaurs.name: Yamaceratops
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yamaceratops is a genus of primitive ceratopsian that lived during the Late Cretaceous in what is now Mongolia.

dinosaurs.name: Yamatosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yamatosaurus (meaning "Yamato reptile") is a genus of basal hadrosaurid from the Late Cretaceous (Maastrichtian)-aged Kita-Ama Formation of Awaji Island, Japan.

dinosaurs.name: Yandusaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yandusaurus is a genus of basal neornithischian dinosaur from the middle Jurassic (Bathonian age, approximately 168 to 162 Ma) of eastern Asia.

dinosaurs.name: Yangchuanosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yangchuanosaurus is an extinct genus of metriacanthosaurid theropod dinosaur that lived in China from the Middle Jurassic to Late Jurassic periods (Bathonian to Tithonian stages), and was similar (although slightly larger) in size and appearance to its North American and European relative, Allosaurus.

dinosaurs.name: Yimenosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yimenosaurus (meaning "Yiman reptile") is an extinct genus of plateosaurid sauropodomorph dinosaur that lived in China in the Early Jurassic.

source.originalWikimediaTitle: 玉溪市博物馆-侏罗纪早期-易门县十街乡脚家店-易门龙 Yimenosaurus 1

dinosaurs.name: Yingshanosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yingshanosaurus (meaning "Yingshan lizard") is an extinct genus of stegosaurian dinosaurs from the Middle Jurassic of what is now Southwestern China.

dinosaurs.name: Yinlong
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yinlong (simplified Chinese: 隐龙; traditional Chinese: 隱龍; pinyin: yǐn lóng, meaning "hidden dragon") is a genus of basal ceratopsian dinosaur from the Late Jurassic Period of China.

source.originalWikimediaTitle: 昌吉恐龙馆 当氏隐龙（Yinlong downsi）

dinosaurs.name: Yixianosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yixianosaurus (meaning "Yixian lizard") is a maniraptoran theropod dinosaur genus from the Early Cretaceous of China.

dinosaurs.name: Ypupiara
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Ypupiara (meaning "the one who lives in the water") is an extinct genus of unenlagiine theropod from the Late Cretaceous Serra da Galga Formation of Brazil.[1] It was the first member of the Dromaeosauridae to be discovered in South America and the first member of the Unenlagiinae to be discovered, but not the first to be identified as such.

dinosaurs.name: Yuanyanglong
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yuanyanglong (meaning "lovebird dragon") is an extinct genus of oviraptorosaurian theropod dinosaurs from the Early Cretaceous Miaogou Formation of China.

dinosaurs.name: Yueosaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yueosaurus is an extinct genus of basal neornithischian dinosaur known from Zhejiang Province, China.[1]

dinosaurs.name: Yutyrannus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yutyrannus (meaning "feathered tyrant") is a genus of proceratosaurid tyrannosauroid dinosaur which contains a single known species, Yutyrannus huali.

dinosaurs.name: Yuxisaurus
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Yuxisaurus (meaning "Yuxi lizard") is an extinct genus of basal thyreophoran dinosaur from the Early Jurassic (Sinemurian-Toarcian) Fengjiahe Formation of southwestern China.

dinosaurs.name: Zalmoxes
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Zalmoxes is a genus of rhabdodontid ornithopod dinosaur from the Maastrichtian age of the Late Cretaceous in what is now Romania.[1] The genus is known from specimens first named as the species Mochlodon robustum in 1899 by Franz Nopcsa before being reclassified as Rhabdodon robustum by him in 1915.

dinosaurs.name: Zapsalis
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Zapsalis is a genus of dromaeosaurine theropod dinosaurs.

dinosaurs.name: Zavacephale
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Zavacephale (meaning "origin head") is an extinct genus of pachycephalosaurian dinosaurs known from the Early Cretaceous Khuren Dukh Formation of Mongolia.

dinosaurs.name: Zhuchengceratops
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Zhuchengceratops is a genus of extinct leptoceratopsid ceratopsian that lived during the Upper Cretaceous of modern-day China.

dinosaurs.name: Zuniceratops
dinosaurs.imageDescription: Curated full-body dinosaur image from DinosaurPictures.org.
dinosaurs.description: Zuniceratops ('Zuni horned face') is a genus of ceratopsian dinosaurs that lived during the Turonian stage of the Late Cretaceous in what is now New Mexico, United States.
